title: Artificing Mastery
summary: Artificing develops into either efficient workshop throughput or higher-complexity invention. Threshold pacing keeps each unlock tied to visible technical growth.

thresholds.title: Workbench Basics
thresholds.description: Pick the kind of artisan you are becoming.

thresholds.title: Applied Method
thresholds.description: Specialization becomes visible in how you approach crafting.

thresholds.title: Systems Thinking
thresholds.description: Your practice moves from tinkering to designed process.

thresholds.title: Master Blueprints
thresholds.description: Late-game mastery supports advanced invention paths.

nodes.title: Precision Fabrication
nodes.description: Leans into careful, exact technical work.

nodes.title: Salvage Loop
nodes.description: Extends the field branch into iterative reuse and adaptation.

nodes.title: Clockwork Layouts
nodes.description: Extends the precision branch into more deliberate mechanism planning.

nodes.title: Improvised Rigging
nodes.description: Commits to responsive invention under field constraints.
